title: Galactic Humane Society
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Galactic Humane Society''' were an organization active during the final [[Standard year/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. By [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] they had posted a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on the [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Jabrogg Thung]], a [[Nerf-throwing|nerf thrower]] who had [[Death/Legends|fatally]] injured several [[Nerf/Legends|nerfs]] during his nerf-throwing career. The society offered a reward of 2000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for the capture of Thung alive and only 1000 credits if he was brought in dead. The bounty was claimed by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], who captured Thung alive on the [[Outland Transit Station]] in the [[Baxel sector/Legends|Baxel sector]], whilst he was there hunting the [[Muttani]] criminal [[Meeko Ghintee]]. It was the station's [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] owner, [[Rozatta]], who informed Fett of the society's bounty posting.<ref name="BH">''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Galactic Humane Society were first mentioned in the game, [[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]], released by [[LucasArts]] in [[2002]]. The society are mentioned in the bounty entry viewable on the players e-scanner for Jabrogg Thung, an optional secondary bounty in the first stage of the first chapter of the game.

*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]''
